summary: Iteration 153 - Testing 4 new changes. All 9 features verified successfully. Investments page tabs do NOT contain Rebalancing (removed from top tabs). Rebalancing link IS present in LH sidebar under INVESTMENTS group. P1 Thompson profile shows correct data (Net Worth $1,608,800, Gross Assets $2,278,000, Liabilities $669,200, Income $185,000). P2 Chen profile shows correct data (Net Worth $5,200,000, Gross Assets $5,200,000, Liabilities $0, Income $450,000). P1 and P2 have completely different data. CRM API returns Thompson as client_1 and Chen as client_2. ErrorBoundary has Retry + Reload buttons for chunk errors. No JavaScript errors on main pages.

issues: Console shows DataCloneError for market data and user profile fetching - appears to be postMessage serialization issue but doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: TEST 1 - Investments Tabs: PASS - Rebalancing NOT in tabs. Tabs: Overview, Bonds, Cash & TDs, Crypto, Managed Funds, Property, Shares & ETFs, SMSF, Super & Pension, Unlisted
TEST 2 - Rebalancing in Sidebar: PASS - Rebalancing link found under INVESTMENTS group in LH sidebar (All Investments, Rebalancing)
TEST 3 - P1 Thompson Profile: PASS - Net Worth $1,608,800, Gross Assets $2,278,000, Liabilities $669,200, Income $185,000, Name: David & Sarah Thompson
TEST 4 - P2 Chen Profile: PASS - Net Worth $5,200,000, Gross Assets $5,200,000, Liabilities $0, Income $450,000, Name: Michael & Lisa Chen
TEST 5 - P1/P2 Different Data: PASS - No shared financial values between Thompson and Chen profiles
TEST 6 - CRM API: PASS - /api/crm/clients returns client_1=Thompson (wealth $1,608,800, income $185,000) and client_2=Chen (wealth $5,200,000, income $450,000)
TEST 7 - ErrorBoundary: PASS - Component has Retry button (data-testid='error-boundary-retry'), Reload Page button for chunk errors, auto-retries up to 2 times
TEST 8 - Client Profile Tab: PASS - Simplified view with allocation bars and goals only
TEST 9 - No JS Errors: PASS - No error boundary fallback visible, pages load correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 changes verified. Key findings: 1) Investments tabs have 10 items (no Rebalancing), 2) Rebalancing is in LH sidebar under INVESTMENTS group, 3) P1 Thompson and P2 Chen profiles have completely separate data with correct values, 4) CRM API correctly maps client_1=Thompson and client_2=Chen, 5) ErrorBoundary handles chunk errors with Retry/Reload buttons. Profile tab accessed via text selector 'Profile' (data-testid='tab-profile' not found).
